simple_types.name: Boolean_Cap_Value
simple_types.code: type Boolean_Cap_Value is (Absent, Cancelled, True_Value, False_Value);

simple_types.name: Read_Error
simple_types.code: type Read_Error is (Read_OK, Read_Not_Found, Read_IO_Error, Read_Too_Large);

simple_types.name: Terminfo_Error
simple_types.code:
type Terminfo_Error is
  (Error_No_Term,
   Error_File_Not_Found,
   Error_IO_Failure,
   Error_Invalid_Magic,
   Error_Header_Corrupt,
   Error_File_Too_Large,
   Error_Encoding);

documentation.description: A string capability contains bytes outside the expected range.

enumeration_literals.name: Error_No_Term
enumeration_literals.description: The TERM environment variable is not set or is empty.

enumeration_literals.name: Error_File_Not_Found
enumeration_literals.description: No terminfo file found for TERM in any searched directory.

enumeration_literals.name: Error_IO_Failure
enumeration_literals.description: Terminfo file found but could not be read.

enumeration_literals.name: Error_Invalid_Magic
enumeration_literals.description: First two bytes do not match a recognised magic number.

enumeration_literals.name: Error_Header_Corrupt
enumeration_literals.description: Header field sizes are inconsistent or cause out-of-bounds access.

subtypes.name: Capability_String_Index
subtypes.code: subtype Capability_String_Index is Natural range 0 .. MAX_CAPABILITY_STRING_LENGTH;
